name: stackra/forms
purpose: Dynamic form builder — Form root definition, FormVersion immutable schema snapshot, and FormSubmission per-completion row with per-field validation.
capabilities: FormVersion immutable schema snapshot per Form
Consent + captcha field types built in
Feeds the leads pipeline for signup forms
when_to_use: Rolling out a signup, feedback, or intake form the tenant authors themselves without a code change.
when_not_to_use: For post-submission qualification and CRM hand-off, chain into the sibling stackra/leads package.
